name: Spinach Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz. HEALTHY CHOICE FAT FREE grated cheddar cheese
8 oz. HEALTHY CHOICE FAT FREE grated mozzarella cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from spinach and wash.
2. Cut onions and saute in water until tender.
3. Wash and slice mushrooms and add to the onions (cook until all water evaporates).
4. Remove onions & mushrooms from heat and put them in a large bowl.
5. Saute spinach in water, tossing frequently, until all liquid evaporates.
6. Mix onions/mushrooms and spinach together in the bowl and make sure onions and mushrooms are evenly distributed throughout the spinach.
7. Beat egg whites lightly.
8. Add grated cheese to the egg mixture and mix thoroughly.
9. Add the spinach mixture to the egg and cheese mixture and stir until well mixed.
CRUST:
1. Phyllo pastry dough is a very thin, flaky crust used in many Greek spinach pies and pastries such as baklava. It has only a trace of fat, and I have seen lemon meringue pie and pumpkin pie recipes using phyllo dough to cut the fat content in pies by 50%.
2. Phyllo can be found in the frozen food section of any supermarket. The box is long, like a spaghetti box. The dough is paper thin, and you use many layers.
3. Use a rectangular glass baking dish, sprayed lightly with PAM.
4. Quickly layer 5-7 sheets on the bottom of the dish, spraying each layer lightly with PAM.
5. Put half of your spinach mixture on top.
6. Put another 5-7 sheets of Phyllo.
7. Then put the last of your spinach mixture.
8. Top with 10 to 15 sheets of phyllo, spraying each layer lightly with PAM.
9. Remove any excess dough around the edges.
10. Moisten your fingertips and seal around the edges like a normal pie crust.
11. Spray the top lightly with PAM.
12. Using a sharp knife, cut through the top layer in the pattern you want (e.g., rectangular patterns that are the size of the pieces you will ultimately cut). In the Greek dessert, Baklava, they cut diamond shapes.
13. Bake at 400-425 degrees for 30 minutes.
WARNING: Phyllo dough is so thin that it dries out and sticks together very easily. There are hints on the box about how to keep it moist.
